title: Sidebar component with document navigation and subscriptions
purpose: Provides a sidebar layout with document navigation, vibe instructions, subscriptions panel, and artifact tree for project organization.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named Sidebar that accepts className prop and uses Zustand store for session data and custom hook for data loading.

steps.content: Extract documents, selected document ID, and current session from the session store.
Access the data loader hook for document selection functionality.
Determine if the sidebar is disabled based on the presence of a current session.
Find the vibe instructions document within the list of documents.
Render the sidebar container with appropriate styling and test identifier.
IF a vibe instructions document exists and the sidebar is not disabled, render the document button with appropriate styling and click handler.
Render the subscriptions panel component with the current project.
